raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "AB 1390 updates the law to optimize the California State Lands Commission's land holdings for revenue generation.",
    "Antiquated restrictions on the Commission's management of school lands prevent effective revenue generation for the California State Teachers Retirement System (CalSTRS).",
    "The Commission has been unable to optimally invest in new properties for the School Land Bank Fund revenue due to statutory constraints.",
    "AB 1390 provides the Commission with flexibility to sell off noncontiguous, square mile plots in remote desert and forest lands.",
    "California's ability to partner with the federal government on renewable energy projects is improved with the passage of AB 1390.",
    "AB 1390 aims to make California a more flexible partner in efforts to cut U.S. greenhouse gas emissions in half by the end of the decade."
  ]
}
```
